format: DCF-Text L2 framing v1 (adapter over the 17-byte DeModFrame quantum)
spec: seq = packet_id[15:10] | frag_idx[9:0]; frag_idx 0 = [len_hi,len_lo,flags,0]; frag_idx 1..N = 4 payload bytes (last zero-padded); type=DATA(0), version=1
theorem: L2 framing is a fixed bit-placement adapter over the certified DeModFrame; matching these framing + reassembly vectors pins the C and Rust implementations to this reference.  The descriptor flags are opaque to L2, so the framing vectors are invariant to the agent/more/reliable flag choice.
